requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Performance Rating — NCh/IEC 60034-1 and SEC Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与性能额定——NCh/IEC 60034-1及SEC要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與性能額定——NCh/IEC 60034-1及SEC要求

summary.en: Industrial AC motors sold in Chile must comply with electrical safety and performance standards recognised by SEC. INN adopts IEC 60034-1 as NCh/IEC 60034-1, specifying ratings and performance for rotating electrical machines. SEC product registration requires technical documentation demonstrating conformity with applicable NCh standards, including rated voltage (380 V), frequency (50 Hz), insulation class, temperature rise limits, and IP protection degree. SEC may require test reports from accredited laboratories demonstrating conformity with NCh/IEC 60034-1. The SEC stamp is affixed only after registration is approved; products without the SEC stamp may not be legally sold or installed in Chile.
summary.zh: 在智利销售的工业交流电机须符合SEC认可的电气安全和性能标准。INN将IEC 60034-1采纳为NCh/IEC 60034-1，规定旋转电机的额定值和性能。SEC产品注册须提供证明符合适用NCh标准的技术文件，包括额定电压（380 V）、频率（50 Hz）、绝缘等级、温升限值和IP防护等级。SEC可能要求经认可实验室出具的证明符合NCh/IEC 60034-1的测试报告。SEC认证章仅在注册批准后加贴；无SEC认证章的产品不得在智利合法销售或安装。
summary.zht: 在智利銷售的工業交流電機須符合SEC認可的電氣安全和性能標準。INN將IEC 60034-1採納為NCh/IEC 60034-1，規定旋轉電機的額定值和性能。SEC產品注冊須提供證明符合適用NCh標準的技術文件，包括額定電壓（380 V）、頻率（50 Hz）、絕緣等級、溫升限值和IP防護等級。SEC可能要求經認可實驗室出具的證明符合NCh/IEC 60034-1的測試報告。SEC認證章僅在注冊批准後加貼；無SEC認證章的產品不得在智利合法銷售或安裝。

standards_or_laws: NCh/IEC 60034-1 (rotating electrical machines — rating and performance, INN adoption of IEC 60034-1)
NCh/IEC 60034-5 (degrees of protection — IP code, INN adoption)
SEC product registration and stamp requirements

summary.en: In China, industrial motors are governed by GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) for ratings and performance, and GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5) for IP protection. Testing is conducted by accredited laboratories; CCC certification is not currently mandatory for general industrial motors but product must meet GB 755 for domestic sale. Chinese motors built to GB 755 are technically close to IEC/NCh 60034-1 requirements due to the standard's IEC equivalence. No separate Chinese export market-access conformity process equivalent to SEC registration exists.
summary.zh: 在中国，工业电机受GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规范，涵盖额定值和性能，以及GB/T 4942-2021（与IEC 60034-5对应）规范IP防护。检测由认可实验室进行；一般工业电机目前不强制要求CCC认证，但国内销售须满足GB 755要求。按GB 755制造的中国电机在技术上接近IEC/NCh 60034-1要求（因标准与IEC等效）。中国没有与SEC注册等效的出口市场准入符合性程序。
summary.zht: 在中國，工業電機受GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規範，涵蓋額定值和性能，以及GB/T 4942-2021（與IEC 60034-5對應）規範IP防護。檢測由認可實驗室進行；一般工業電機目前不強制要求CCC認證，但國內銷售須滿足GB 755要求。按GB 755製造的中國電機在技術上接近IEC/NCh 60034-1要求（因標準與IEC等效）。中國沒有與SEC注冊等效的出口市場准入符合性程序。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (旋转电机 额定值和性能, equivalent to IEC 60034-1)
GB/T 4942-2021 (IP protection for rotating machines, aligned with IEC 60034-5)

gap.en: Chinese GB 755 technical content is equivalent to IEC 60034-1, which INN has adopted as NCh/IEC 60034-1, so motors built and tested to GB 755 are technically close to Chilean NCh requirements. However, SEC product registration requires formal documentation referencing NCh standards, test reports from recognised laboratories, and the SEC stamp must be obtained before market entry. The procedural gap — not the technical gap — is the primary barrier: Chinese GB 755 test reports may be accepted as technical evidence for SEC registration if their equivalence to NCh/IEC 60034-1 is documented, but this must be confirmed with SEC. The 380 V / 50 Hz grid parity means rated nameplate data is directly applicable to Chile.
gap.zh: 中国GB 755技术内容与IEC 60034-1等效，而INN已将其采纳为NCh/IEC 60034-1，因此按GB 755制造和测试的电机在技术上接近智利NCh要求。但SEC产品注册须提供引用NCh标准的正式文件、经认可实验室的测试报告，并在进入市场前获得SEC认证章。主要壁垒是程序性差距而非技术差距：如能记录与NCh/IEC 60034-1的等效性，中国GB 755测试报告可能作为SEC注册的技术证据被接受，但须向SEC确认。380 V/50 Hz电网参数一致意味着铭牌额定数据可直接适用于智利。
gap.zht: 中國GB 755技術內容與IEC 60034-1等效，而INN已將其採納為NCh/IEC 60034-1，因此按GB 755製造和測試的電機在技術上接近智利NCh要求。但SEC產品注冊須提供引用NCh標準的正式文件、經認可實驗室的測試報告，並在進入市場前獲得SEC認證章。主要壁垒是程序性差距而非技術差距：如能記錄與NCh/IEC 60034-1的等效性，中國GB 755測試報告可能作為SEC注冊的技術證據被接受，但須向SEC確認。380 V/50 Hz電網參數一致意味著銘牌額定數據可直接適用於智利。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC stamp and product registration required; NCh/IEC 60034-1 conformity evidence required for registration; no SEC stamp = product cannot be legally sold or installed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — GB 755-2019 compliance required; CCC not mandatory for general industrial motors; no export-specific mandatory safety step

source.publisher: SEC — Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors built to GB 755 / GB/T 4942 are technically close to NCh/IEC 60034-1 / NCh/IEC 60034-5 benchmarks, reducing the technical conformity gap. However, SEC mandatory stamp and product registration are legal prerequisites for Chilean market entry; these procedural steps have no Chinese equivalent and must be completed regardless of technical test results. The 380 V / 50 Hz grid match means nameplate data requires no adjustment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GB 755/GB/T 4942制造的中国电机在技术上接近NCh/IEC 60034-1/NCh/IEC 60034-5基准，减少了技术合规差距。但SEC强制认证章和产品注册是智利市场准入的法定前提条件；这些程序步骤在中国没有对应要求，无论技术测试结果如何均须完成。380 V/50 Hz电网参数一致意味着铭牌数据无需调整。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GB 755/GB/T 4942製造的中國電機在技術上接近NCh/IEC 60034-1/NCh/IEC 60034-5基準，減少了技術合規差距。但SEC強制認證章和產品注冊是智利市場准入的法定前提條件；這些程序步驟在中國沒有對應要求，無論技術測試結果如何均須完成。380 V/50 Hz電網參數一致意味著銘牌數據無需調整。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: IP Protection Class and Insulation — NCh/IEC 60034-5 and SEC Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: IP防护等级与绝缘——NCh/IEC 60034-5及SEC文件
requirement_topic.zht: IP防護等級與絕緣——NCh/IEC 60034-5及SEC文件

summary.en: Motors registered with SEC in Chile must declare their IP protection class (Ingress Protection) in accordance with NCh/IEC 60034-5 (INN adoption of IEC 60034-5). The IP class must be marked on the nameplate and supported by test evidence. Insulation class (per NCh/IEC 60034-1) must also be declared. SEC registration documentation should include IP class and insulation class specifications. Industrial installation environments in Chile (mining, agriculture, coastal) may require specific minimum IP classes; this should be confirmed for the target application. Cooling method (IC code, per NCh/IEC 60034-6) must also be indicated on the nameplate.
summary.zh: 在智利向SEC注册的电机须依据NCh/IEC 60034-5（INN对IEC 60034-5的采纳版本）声明其IP防护等级。IP等级须在铭牌上标注并有测试证据支撑。绝缘等级（按NCh/IEC 60034-1）也须声明。SEC注册文件应包含IP等级和绝缘等级规格。智利工业安装环境（采矿、农业、沿海）可能要求特定最低IP等级；须针对目标应用确认。冷却方式（IC代码，按NCh/IEC 60034-6）也须在铭牌上标注。
summary.zht: 在智利向SEC注冊的電機須依據NCh/IEC 60034-5（INN對IEC 60034-5的採納版本）聲明其IP防護等級。IP等級須在銘牌上標注並有測試證據支撐。絕緣等級（按NCh/IEC 60034-1）也須聲明。SEC注冊文件應包含IP等級和絕緣等級規格。智利工業安裝環境（採礦、農業、沿海）可能要求特定最低IP等級；須針對目標應用確認。冷卻方式（IC代碼，按NCh/IEC 60034-6）也須在銘牌上標注。

standards_or_laws: NCh/IEC 60034-5 (degrees of protection — IP code, INN adoption of IEC 60034-5)
NCh/IEC 60034-1 (insulation class and temperature rise limits)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5) for IP protection classification of rotating machines, and GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) for insulation class and temperature rise limits. GB 12665 covers cooling methods for motors. IP class and insulation class must be marked on the Chinese motor nameplate. Chinese test reports for IP class and insulation class based on GB/T 4942 and GB 755 are technically close to NCh/IEC equivalents, as the underlying IEC basis is the same.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB/T 4942-2021（与IEC 60034-5对应）对旋转电机进行IP防护分类，使用GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规定绝缘等级和温升限值。GB 12665涵盖电机冷却方式。IP等级和绝缘等级须在中国电机铭牌上标注。基于GB/T 4942和GB 755的中国IP等级和绝缘等级测试报告，在技术上接近NCh/IEC对应标准，因底层IEC基础相同。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB/T 4942-2021（與IEC 60034-5對應）對旋轉電機進行IP防護分類，使用GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規定絕緣等級和溫升限值。GB 12665涵蓋電機冷卻方式。IP等級和絕緣等級須在中國電機銘牌上標注。基於GB/T 4942和GB 755的中國IP等級和絕緣等級測試報告，在技術上接近NCh/IEC對應標準，因底層IEC基礎相同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 4942-2021 (IP protection for rotating machines, aligned with IEC 60034-5)
GB 755-2019 (insulation class and temperature rise, equivalent to IEC 60034-1)

gap.en: The technical gap is minimal: Chinese GB/T 4942 and GB 755 are equivalent or closely aligned with NCh/IEC 60034-5 and NCh/IEC 60034-1 respectively, as both derive from the same IEC base standards. The procedural gap is that SEC registration documentation must reference NCh standards and include test evidence; Chinese test reports may be accepted as technical evidence if IEC/NCh equivalence is documented and confirmed with SEC. Chile's industrial sectors (notably mining) often specify higher IP classes (IP54, IP55, IP65) — exporters should confirm customer application requirements match the motor's declared IP class.
gap.zh: 技术差距极小：中国GB/T 4942和GB 755分别与NCh/IEC 60034-5和NCh/IEC 60034-1等效或高度对齐，因为两者均源于相同的IEC基础标准。程序性差距在于SEC注册文件须引用NCh标准并提供测试证据；若能记录IEC/NCh等效性并获SEC确认，中国测试报告可能被接受为技术证据。智利工业行业（特别是采矿业）通常指定更高的IP等级（IP54、IP55、IP65）——出口商应确认客户应用要求与电机声明的IP等级匹配。
gap.zht: 技術差距極小：中國GB/T 4942和GB 755分別與NCh/IEC 60034-5和NCh/IEC 60034-1等效或高度對齊，因為兩者均源於相同的IEC基礎標準。程序性差距在於SEC注冊文件須引用NCh標準並提供測試證據；若能記錄IEC/NCh等效性並獲SEC確認，中國測試報告可能被接受為技術證據。智利工業行業（特別是採礦業）通常指定更高的IP等級（IP54、IP55、IP65）——出口商應確認客戶應用要求與電機聲明的IP等級匹配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory declaration — IP class and insulation class must be declared and documented for SEC registration; nameplate marking of IP and insulation class required; specific IP class requirements vary by installation environment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — IP class and insulation class marking required per GB/T 4942 and GB 755; CCC not mandatory for general industrial motors

source.publisher: INN — Instituto Nacional de Normalización, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors with IP class and insulation class declared and tested per GB/T 4942 / GB 755 are technically close to NCh/IEC 60034-5 / NCh/IEC 60034-1 requirements, reducing the technical gap. The primary obligation is to include this information in SEC registration documentation with NCh standard references. Confirm with SEC whether Chinese test reports are accepted as technical evidence for IP and insulation class. For Chilean mining or coastal applications, verify minimum IP class requirements with the end customer. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GB/T 4942/GB 755声明并测试IP等级和绝缘等级的中国电机，在技术上接近NCh/IEC 60034-5/NCh/IEC 60034-1要求，减少技术差距。主要义务是在SEC注册文件中引用NCh标准纳入上述信息。须向SEC确认中国测试报告是否被接受为IP等级和绝缘等级的技术证据。对于智利采矿或沿海应用，须向最终客户确认最低IP等级要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GB/T 4942/GB 755聲明並測試IP等級和絕緣等級的中國電機，在技術上接近NCh/IEC 60034-5/NCh/IEC 60034-1要求，減少技術差距。主要義務是在SEC注冊文件中引用NCh標準納入上述信息。須向SEC確認中國測試報告是否被接受為IP等級和絕緣等級的技術證據。對於智利採礦或沿海應用，須向最終客戶確認最低IP等級要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
